title: athyrium filix-femina var. pectinatum
intro: Athyrium filix-femina var. pectinatum, also known as the lady fern or lady's fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina var. pectinatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
